title: Going Bananaz
description: A mod that adds a few things such as: Bananas, a Music disc, a Biome and even more Bananas.
body:
My first (posted) mod ever ! Features lots of cool things.
Remember, this mod is at its start, new things might be added to the mod later. Feel free to give ideas or feedback.

List of things that it adds: Bananas, 1 Music disc, *_New loot_ and *_1 Biome_.

*This biome is the **Musa grove**, containing the Musa trees in which contain bananas. You can check it out in the **gallery**

*The new loot that can be found also contain bananas.(Found in plains villages, jungle temples, nether fortresses, strongholds and end cities)
